sections.paragraph:
ὑπόμνησις, εως, ἡ [ὑπομιμνῄσκω] ‘act of calling to mind’, reminding

—a. act. aspect w. focus on bringing a pers. to the point of recollection, ἐν ὑπομνήσει by way of reminder 2 Pt 1:13; 3:1.

—b.pass. aspect ὑπόμνησιν λαβὼν τῆς ἐν σοὶ ἀνυποϰρίτου πίστεως as I receive reminding of your unfeigned commitment/faith = as I recall your unfeigned commitment 2 Ti 1:5.
